name: MAG-7 | 棱彩阶梯
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. A pearlescent optical illusion pattern has been applied. Where does it start and where does it end? Does it end?
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器绘有珍珠色的光学幻觉图案。 从哪儿开始？在哪儿结束？结束了吗？
